parameters-en.Step Time: Sets the time between steps. The total delay time is Time x Steps, so [Time: 1/16 x Steps: 8] is a 1/2-note. When set to note values, Time follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Feedback: Controls the overall number of repeats heard for the entire sequence. If you want to hear all fills in the sequence only once, set to 0%.
parameters-en.Steps: Determines the number of steps in the sequence, from 1 to 16.
parameters-en.Fill: Controls the number of active taps (from 1 to 16), whose spacing is set by Euclidean algorithms. If Fill is higher than Steps, the extra taps are ignored.
parameters-en.Rotate: Rotates all fills forward by the same amount (0-15). Used if you like the sound of a repeat pattern but want the fills and gaps shifted forward.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the delay sequence and the dry signal. At 0%, no delay sequence is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Low Cut: Applies a low cut (high pass) filter to the fills, letting you remove the effected signal below a certain frequency.
parameters-en.High Cut: Applies a high cut (low pass) filter to the fills, letting you remove the effected signal above a certain frequency.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
